field.label: Admin API URL
field.help: Keycloak admin REST API base, e.g. https://idp.example.com/admin/realms/myrealm

field.label: Client ID
field.help: Confidential client id with service account enabled (e.g. radius-client).

field.label: Client secret
field.help: Client secret of the confidential client.

field.label: Skip TLS verification
field.help: Do not verify the Keycloak TLS certificate. Only use with self-signed certificates in trusted networks.

field.label: Listen address
field.help: IP address to bind the RADIUS listener to. Use 0.0.0.0 to listen on all IPv4 addresses.

field.label: OTP challenge message
field.help: Message shown to the user during the OTP challenge-response step.

field.label: Disable challenge-response
field.help: Allow OTP users to authenticate with <password><otp> in the User-Password field instead of using RADIUS Access-Challenge. Use for legacy clients that cannot handle challenge-response.

field.label: Disable Message-Authenticator
field.help: Disable Message-Authenticator verification and generation. Only for legacy clients.

field.label: Debug logging
field.help: Enable verbose debug logging for RADIUS and Keycloak communication.
